---
title: "Reward task EEG"


number-sections: true
date: today
date-format: long

title-block-banner: true
title-block-style: default

bibliography: bibliography.bib
csl: apa.csl

author: 
- name: Qianyue Li
- name: Zheng Lin
- name: Yanhong Xu

format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    code-block-bg: true
    code-block-border-left: "#31BAE9"
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-title: Contents 
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    documentclass: scrreprt
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{setspace}
      - \onehalfspacing
    papersize: letter 
    fontsize: 12pt
jupyter: python3
---

# Introduction {#sec-introduction}
{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

# Experiment {#sec-experiment}

{{< include _experiment.qmd >}}

# Analysis Methods {#sec-analysis}
{{< include _analysis-methods.qmd >}}

# Results {#sec-results}

{{< include _results.qmd >}}

# Discussion {#sec-discussion}

{{< include _discussion.qmd >}}

# Contribution Table

{{< include _contribution-table.qmd >}}
